title: some sorta ipsum
description: This is where some might include some sort of generated text block, but we decided to write this pointless sentence instead.

title: another sorta ipsum
description: I'm not sure what my favorite type of pizza is, but I've come around to the idea of pineapple on pizzas. I think it's especially good when mixed with jalapenos and some sort of protein.

title: the final sorta ipsum
description: If I could have any sort of car in the world, I would get a Porsche 964. Unfortunately prices have been on the steady rise, and even if I decided it prudent/was able to buy one, I've got nowhere to put it.
